name: In Memoriam
description: Automatically creates a collection of movies featuring recently deceased actors. Uses TheMovieDB metadata to identify actors who have passed away within a configurable timeframe.
overview: The In Memoriam plugin automatically creates a collection of movies featuring recently deceased actors, pulling metadata from TheMovieDB. It runs on server startup and daily to keep the collection current.

versions.changelog: Initial release - Automatic detection of recently deceased actors based on configurable lookback period
